# Expected behavior for mixed inertia types test
# The test should successfully:
# 1. Parse the model with mixed integer and float values
# 2. Handle both IntegerExp and FloatExp in the same model
# 3. Create inertia variables using createInertiaVariable() without errors
# 4. Demonstrate that the fixed casting issues work correctly

Test should handle mixed numeric types and create proper inertia matrix variables.
